entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Plan: Wire folder population to tree notifications and ensure the enhanced tree module links in your build. I’ll add a WM_NOTIFY handler that delegates to FileTree_OnNotify, implement path-building in the tree module, and update the build script to include the new object (with a small tab control stub to satisfy UI dependencies).

What I changed

File file_tree_working_enhanced.asm:

Added FileTree_OnNotify: handles WM_NOTIFY from the tree; populates on double-click and item-expand.
Added BuildPathForItem: walks parent items via TVM_GETNEXTITEM/TVM_GETITEM, builds a full path, and calls PopulateDirectory.
Exported g_hFileTree and FileTree_OnNotify so window.asm can link to them.
Fixed MASM specifics: .code segment, proper LOCAL placement, manual SendMessage usage, valid backslash constants (92), and register staging for memory moves.
File window.asm:

Routed WM_NOTIFY to the file tree: compares NMHDR.hwndFrom to g_hFileTree and calls FileTree_OnNotify.
Used EXTERNDEF FileTree_OnNotify:PROTO :DWORD with invoke so stdcall decoration matches for linking.
File src/tab_control_stub.asm:

Added a minimal CreateTabControl stub to satisfy UI layout dependency without pulling in the complex tab control module.
File build_minimal.ps1:

Updated $workingFiles to include ui_layout, tab_control_stub, and file_tree_working_enhanced (removed file_explorer).
Results

file_tree_working_enhanced.asm assembles cleanly.
window.asm assembles cleanly.
Full build links successfully: AgenticIDEWin.exe.
Try it

Build the enhanced IDE executable:

pwsh -NoLogo -File "C:\Users\HiH8e\OneDrive\Desktop\RawrXD-production-lazy-init\masm_ide\build_minimal.ps1"
Notes

Folder population triggers on double-click and item expand (using common control codes: NM_DBLCLK = -3, TVN_ITEMEXPANDING ≈ -405). If you want additional events (e.g., single-click select), I can extend the handler to match your preferred UX.
The tab control integration is currently stubbed; I can wire the real tab_control.asm once we decide on the control set and fix its compile errors.
Want me to:

Replace the stub with a fixed tab_control.asm?
Add lazy-loading flags to avoid re-populating already-expanded nodes?'
